name: Acid
description: Caustic substances that burn chemically, eating away at flesh and bone.

name: Disease
description: Plague, rot, and decay: all detrimental to the living.

name: Divine
description: Associated with direct expressions of the divine: the outpouring of the raw energies of reality’s undercurrent. It is often asked “what does the divine feel like?” - but all those who have witnessed it never forget.

name: Fear
description: Even the most formidable warrior is subject to fear, hesitation, and doubt.

name: Flame
description: Searing heat and crackling blasts of fire to burn and incinerate.

name: Force
description: Physical power generated magically or otherwise. These effects can be invisible to the eye, but more often felt as a thrumming in the air.

name: Ice
description: Just as often extreme cold as actual shards of deadly ice.

name: Life
description: The vibrant energy of life itself.

name: Lightning
description: Blue-white bolts of electricity that crackle through the air, leaving the scent of ozone.

name: Mind
description: Represents mental or psionic power, or sometimes sheer willpower.

name: Poison
description: Venoms, gasses and toxins, whether natural or manufactured.

name: Void
description: Suffocating nothingness: usually from the creatures of the Void.
